---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working right
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**What went wrong?**
Tell us what happened. A screenshot or short video is very helpful if you can share one.

**What were you trying to do?**
- [ ] Connecting to my device
- [ ] Browsing or managing files
- [ ] Uploading files
- [ ] Updating firmware (DFU)
- [ ] Something else: <!-- describe -->

**What did you expect to happen instead?**

**Your setup**
- Device: <!-- e.g. allmiibo, amiibotool, Flashiibo, Wuzplay, Joysfusion -->
- Device variant: <!-- LCD or OLED, if you know -->
- Firmware version: <!-- shown in the app after connecting, e.g. 2.16.0 -->
- Browser: <!-- Chrome, Edge, Brave, or Bluefy on iOS -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, Android 14, macOS 15, iOS 18 -->
- Desktop or mobile: <!-- phone/tablet issues are often BLE-specific -->

**If this is a firmware update (DFU) issue**
- Were you updating from the release list or a local .zip file?
- Was the device already connected in the file browser, or did you start fresh?
- How far did the transfer get before failing? (e.g. percentage, which stage)
- Did you get a specific error message in the progress area?

**Anything else?**
Error messages, console logs (F12), or other details that might help.
